title: Kaleidoscope Tavern
description: Focused on tavern-themed content, adding a complete brewing system along with a rich selection of decorative blocks to bring your tavern to life.
body:
# Kaleidoscope: Tavern 森罗物语：酒馆

> A Minecraft mod that brings an immersive tavern experience with a complete brewing system and rich decorative content.

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-Java%20Edition-brightgreen)
![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD%20|%20CC%20BY--NC--SA%204.0-blue)

## Introduction

Kaleidoscope: Tavern is a mod developed for Minecraft Java Edition. This mod is committed to bringing a rich brewing experience and tavern-themed decorative content to your world. Grow grapes, craft fine drinks through a multi-stage fermentation system, and build the perfect tavern atmosphere — all in one mod.

## Features

- 🍷 Complete multi-stage brewing system with 7 quality levels
- 🍾 10+ types of drinks including Wine, Champagne, Whiskey, Vodka and more
- 🌿 Grape farming with wild grapevines, trellises, and a pressing tub
- 🪑 16-color sofas and bar stools (sit-able)
- 🏠 Rich tavern decorations: bar counter, bar cabinet, string lights, paintings and more
- 📋 Writable chalkboard and sandwich board with text alignment options
- 🔥 Throwable Molotov Cocktail

## Images

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r9RZvhiJ/images/2dd52452074dbb9d063ace8a58795e402adaede8.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r9RZvhiJ/images/0e8bb04dbf5aeb78c501213658f3b9a9c0e5e0b8.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r9RZvhiJ/images/3c5dd2b270bf77c4fc8cd1abcfee12e0ec991cee.png)
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r9RZvhiJ/images/7f80bd4da2f9852cdf1a9f30146a600c33983de8.png)
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r9RZvhiJ/images/9c468f09cbfea73b40ac3a154effba69266ab481.png)

## Brewing System

Grow **grapes** on trellises or find **wild grapevines** in the world. Crush your harvest in the **Pressing Tub**, then fill a **Barrel** with juice and ingredients to start fermentation.

Your brew's quality evolves over time through **7 levels**:

| Level | Quality |
|-------|---------|
| 1 | Undrinkable |
| 2 | Inferior |
| 3 | Common |
| 4 | Fine |
| 5 | Crafted |
| 6 | Exquisite |
| 7 | **Vintage** |

Once ready, attach a **Tap** to your barrel and extract the finished drink into a bottle.

### Available Drinks

- Wine, Champagne, Vodka, Brandy, Whiskey
- Carignan, Sakura Wine, Plum Wine, Ice Wine
- Vinegar
- Grape Juice, Sweet Berries Juice, Glow Berries Juice
- **Molotov Cocktail** *(throwable)*

## Decoration

- **Sofas** — 16 colors, sit-able
- **Bar Stools** — 16 colors, sit-able
- **Bar Counter** — for the classic bar look
- **Bar Cabinet / Glass Bar Cabinet** — display your finest bottles
- **Chalkboard & Sandwich Board** — write custom text with alignment options
- **String Lights** — 17 color variants for ambient lighting
- **Paintings** — featuring famous artworks and original art
- **Stepladder** — a handy decorative utility block

## Mod Compatibility

- **JEI / REI / EMI** — Full recipe category support
- **Jade** — Barrel status HUD (brew level, ingredients, next level)

## License Agreement

This project adopts a dual license agreement:

- **Source code**: [BSD 3-Clause License](https://github.com/KaleidoscopeMods/KaleidoscopeTavern/blob/main/LICENSE-CODE)

## Feedback and Suggestions

If you encounter problems or have suggestions for improvements during use, please contact us through the following methods:

<https://github.com/KaleidoscopeMods/KaleidoscopeTavern/issues>
